requirement: Protocol must include protocol version number and date on the title page
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning protocol version, version number, protocol date, amendment number, or document control information on the title page or header.
fail_conditions: no version number found anywhere in protocol
title page missing version and date
pass_conditions: version number present on title page
protocol date present on title page
regulatory_reference: FDA IND Guidance — Protocol title page requirements

requirement: Protocol must identify sponsor name, address, and contact information
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning sponsor name, sponsor address, sponsor contact, or sponsor details.
pass_conditions: sponsor address and contact information provided

requirement: Protocol must include stopping rules or discontinuation criteria
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning stopping rules, discontinuation criteria, withdrawal criteria, study stopping, or participant discontinuation.
pass_conditions: stopping rules present for individual participants

requirement: Protocol must include a statistical analysis plan or reference to a separate SAP
extract_instruction: Find any text mentioning statistical analysis plan, SAP, statistical methods, analysis methodology, or reference to a separate statistical document.
fail_conditions: no statistical analysis plan or reference found
pass_conditions: statistical analysis plan present or referenced
regulatory_reference: FDA IND Guidance — Statistical analysis requirements
